hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】美伊协议缓解了战争的不确定性 - 但仍有很多事情有待解决；【CRYPTO】SpaceX 首次公开募股对其 13 亿美元的比特币储备意味着什么；【CRYPTO】Aerodrome 正在将流动性转变为预测市场，这是迄今为止最大规模的升级。

items.title: US-Iran deal eases uncertainty over the war - but there is much still to play out
items.summary: Pakistan says the deal includes Lebanon, but recent ceasefires there have failed to take hold.
items.title_zh: 美伊协议缓解了战争的不确定性 - 但仍有很多事情有待解决
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦表示，该协议包括黎巴嫩，但黎巴嫩最近的停火未能落实。

items.title: Here's what SpaceX's IPO means for its $1.3 billion bitcoin reserve
items.summary: The largest company on public markets now holds bitcoin as a treasury reserve, not as a business model. Its first earnings cycles will test which version of corporate crypto survives a bear market.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股对其 13 亿美元的比特币储备意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 公开市场上最大的公司现在将比特币作为库存储备，而不是作为一种商业模式。它的第一个盈利周期将测试哪种版本的企业加密货币能够在熊市中幸存下来。

items.title: Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet
items.summary: The concept, called Predictive Allocation, will encourage participants to anticipate where liquidity will be needed next, instead of rewarding them for directing incentives toward pools that have already generated fees.
items.title_zh: Aerodrome 正在将流动性转变为预测市场，这是迄今为止最大规模的升级
items.summary_zh: 这一概念称为“预测分配”，将鼓励参与者预测下一步需要流动性的地方，而不是奖励他们将激励措施导向已经产生费用的矿池。

items.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
items.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.
items.title_zh: 从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报
items.summary_zh: 随着 SpaceX 寻求近 1.8 万亿美元的 IPO 估值，早期押注有望创造风险投资历史上最大的账面收益。

items.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
items.summary: The yellow metal is at its lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.
items.title_zh: 尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因
items.summary_zh: 由于潜在利率上升和技术信号不稳定对价格造成压力，黄金正处于今年的最低水平。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Tehran Reach Framework for Peace
items.summary: The deal was expected to open the Strait of Hormuz and lift the U.S. naval blockade on Iranian ports. But it would leave the thorniest nuclear issues for another day.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和德黑兰达成和平框架
items.summary_zh: 预计该协议将开放霍尔木兹海峡并解除美国对伊朗港口的海上封锁。但最棘手的核问题将留待日后解决。

items.title: The Funding: Is the bitcoin bottom in? Crypto funds weigh in
items.summary: Crypto funds share their outlook on bitcoin, the biggest risks ahead, and where they see the best risk-reward opportunities today.
items.title_zh: 资金：比特币触底了吗？加密货币基金发挥作用
items.summary_zh: 加密货币基金分享了他们对比特币的展望、未来最大的风险，以及他们认为当今最好的风险回报机会。

items.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in second-largest negative adjustment of 2026
items.summary: The cut hands surviving miners roughly 11% more bitcoin per unit of active hashrate, but all-in production economics remain underwater at current prices.
items.title_zh: 比特币挖矿难度下降10%，创2026年第二大负调整
items.summary_zh: 此次削减使幸存的矿工每单位活跃算力的比特币增加了大约 11%，但以目前的价格计算，总体生产经济效益仍处于水下。

items.title: Coinbase quantum report flags exchange cold wallets among millions of bitcoin exposed by address reuse
items.summary: The report lays out possible solutions to the abandoned coins problem, such as setting a deadline for migration and then freezing vulnerable coins.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 量子报告标记了因地址重用而暴露的数百万比特币之间的交换冷钱包
items.summary_zh: 该报告列出了废弃代币问题的可能解决方案，例如设定迁移期限，然后冻结易受攻击的代币。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs snap five-day outflow streak with $85.8 million Friday inflow as ether funds keep sliding
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT led Friday's inflows at $57.7 million, with Fidelity's FBTC adding $18.0 million, while no fund reported a net outflow on the day.
items.title_zh: 由于以太坊基金持续下滑，现货比特币 ETF 周五流入 8580 万美元，结束了连续五天的资金流出
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 IBIT 周五以 5,770 万美元的资金流入领先，富达 (Fidelity) 的 FBTC 增加 1,800 万美元，但当天没有基金报告出现净流出。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: KKR says AI productivity boom to keep on going — but warns of 'extreme' trend not seen since the 19th century
items.summary: KKR said in its mid-year outlook Thursday that AI will drive economic growth for years to come, but only in specific sectors.
items.title_zh: KKR 表示人工智能生产力繁荣将持续下去，但警告称，可能会出现 19 世纪以来从未出现过的“极端”趋势
items.summary_zh: KKR 在周四的年中展望中表示，人工智能将在未来几年推动经济增长，但仅限于特定领域。

items.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，花旗集团股价跑赢下跌市场
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普在社交媒体帖子中赞扬花旗集团的转变后，简·弗雷泽领导的花旗集团股价下跌 1%，跌幅低于市场其他股票和其他一些主要银行。

items.title: Deadlocked Wars: How Major Powers Misread the Regions They Attacked
items.summary: Russia and the United States projected their own centralized views onto Ukraine and Iran, analysts said. As a result, the smaller countries trapped larger ones in a costly confrontation.
items.title_zh: 战争僵局：大国如何误读他们攻击的地区
items.summary_zh: 分析人士表示，俄罗斯和美国对乌克兰和伊朗表达了各自的集中观点。结果，较小的国家将较大的国家陷入了代价高昂的对抗之中。

items.title: Germany and Japan Are Rearming Again, 80 Years After World War II
items.summary: After becoming allies to disastrous effect in the 1940s, Berlin and Tokyo are finding new reasons to team up — including rebuilding their militaries.
items.title_zh: 二战后 80 年后，德国和日本再次重新武装
items.summary_zh: 柏林和东京在 20 世纪 40 年代成为盟友并带来灾难性影响后，现在正在寻找新的合作理由——包括重建军队。

items.title: Crypto’s next billion-dollar hacker may move at superhuman speed
items.summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Fable 5 puts powerful cyber tools behind safety filters. DeFi, already hit by more than $840 million in hacks this year, is one of the industries with the most to lose if the filters fail.
items.title_zh: 加密货币下一个价值数十亿美元的黑客可能会以超人的速度行动
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的新 Claude Fable 5 将强大的网络工具置于安全过滤器后面。 DeFi 今年已遭受超过 8.4 亿美元的黑客攻击，如果过滤器失效，它是损失最大的行业之一。

items.title: Zimbabwe moves to regulate crypto sector, requiring firms to register with central bank: Reuters
items.summary: Registration costs an initial $500 with renewal costing $400 a year, and operating without registration is now an offense, according to Reuters.
items.title_zh: 津巴布韦采取措施监管加密货币行业，要求公司向央行注册：路透社
items.summary_zh: 据路透社报道，初始注册费用为 500 美元，续订费用为每年 400 美元，未经注册而运营现在属于违法行为。

items.title: Venice and Morpheus tokens climb as US ban on Anthropic’s Fable 5 fuels ‘permissionless AI’ pitch
items.summary: Venice founder Erik Voorhees and the official Morpheus account seized on the shutdown, casting it as proof of "permissionless" AI's use case.
items.title_zh: 随着美国对 Anthropic 的《神鬼寓言 5》的禁令助长“无需许可的人工智能”宣传，Venice 和 Morpheus 代币攀升
items.summary_zh: Venice 创始人 Erik Voorhees 和 Morpheus 官方账户抓住了这次关闭的机会，将其视为“无需许可”人工智能用例的证据。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Humanity (H)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #74.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：人性 (H)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 74。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Siren (SIREN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #491.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#491。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #116.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 116 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Backpack (BP)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #253.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：背包 (BP)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 253 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: OpenGradient (OPG)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #493.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：OpenGradient (OPG)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#493。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: Bitcoin hits a two-week high above $65,500 as the US-Iran deal sends oil sliding
items.summary: A peace agreement that reopens the Strait of Hormuz pulled the geopolitical premium out of oil and put back into risk assets.
items.title_zh: 美伊协议导致油价下滑，比特币触及 65,500 美元上方两周高点
items.summary_zh: 重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的和平协议将地缘政治溢价从石油中拉回风险资产。

items.title: Bitcoin shoots higher on Iran peace deal, with Strait of Hormuz set to open
items.summary: The price of crude oil is tumbling, and U.S. stock futures are moving higher.
items.title_zh: 伊朗和平协议推动比特币走高，霍尔木兹海峡即将开放
items.summary_zh: 原油价格暴跌，美国股指期货走高。

items.title: Bitcoin could crash to $48,000, if this historical pattern is triggered
items.summary: A pattern stretching back to bitcoin's earliest days has held through every market cycle. It has yet to be tested in the current one.
items.title_zh: 如果触发这一历史模式，比特币可能会暴跌至 48,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 一种可以追溯到比特币早期的模式贯穿了每个市场周期。目前尚未对其进行测试。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
items.title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作台

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
items.summary: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.
items.title_zh: 据报道查理·贾维斯寻求特朗普的赦免
items.summary_zh: Javice 创立了一家名为 Frank 的初创公司，摩根大通于 2021 年以 1.75 亿美元收购了该公司。

items.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
items.summary: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.
items.title_zh: 为什么道明证券预计 SpaceX 未来会更辉煌
items.summary_zh: 道明证券 (TD Securities) 指数和市场结构主管彼得·海恩斯 (Peter Haynes) 表示，SpaceX 的公开亮相只是 SpaceX 更大时间表的一小部分。

items.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数已经对 SpaceX 股票进行了重大看涨，指数基金投资者需要知道这一点
items.summary_zh: 投资了数万亿退休储蓄的标准普尔 500 指数对 SpaceX 的 IPO 表示拒绝，这是历史上规模最大的 IPO。这对于投资组合意味着什么。

items.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
items.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在纳斯达克首次公开募股中筹集了 750 亿美元创纪录的资金
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 以每股 135 美元的价格出售 555.6 股股票，筹集了 750 亿美元的资金，这是有记录以来最大规模的 IPO。

items.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
items.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 将零售 IPO 分配削减至 20%
items.summary_zh: 据一位知情人士透露，这家由埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司计划将 20% 左右的产品直接面向零售买家。

items.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
items.summary: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员表示，SpaceX 首次亮相时的收盘价将突破 2 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX 很可能会加入由六家公司组成、市值超过 2 万亿美元的行列。

items.title: Trump heralds Iran deal but questions - and risks - remain
items.summary: The announcement of an Iran deal was a welcome birthday gift for the president – but its success or failure may hinge on the details.
items.title_zh: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成协议，但问题和风险依然存在
items.summary_zh: 伊朗协议的宣布对总统来说是一份受欢迎的生日礼物，但其成败可能取决于细节。

items.title: Oil prices slide after Pakistan announces deal between US and Iran
items.summary: Under the agreement, the key Strait of Hormuz waterway will be reopened, US President Donald Trump said.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦宣布美国和伊朗达成协议后油价下跌
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，根据协议，重要的霍尔木兹海峡航道将重新开放。

items.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap
items.summary: Nearly 55% of participants voted against the proposal to cap population by cutting migration, results show.
items.title_zh: 瑞士选民拒绝接受1000万人口上限
items.summary_zh: 结果显示，近 55% 的参与者投票反对通过减少移民来限制人口的提案。

items.title: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks
items.summary: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.
items.title_zh: 尼克斯队取得历史性的 NBA 胜利后，曼哈顿青少年遭枪杀，巴士被纵火
items.summary_zh: 尼克斯队击败马刺队夺冠后，至少有 63 人在骚乱中被捕。

items.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
items.summary: Swiss police deployed a water cannon and fired tear gas to disperse anti-G7 protesters after clashes.
items.title_zh: 七国集团日内瓦峰会前抗议者与警方发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 冲突后，瑞士警方出动水枪并发射催泪瓦斯驱散反七国集团抗议者。

items.title: Trump hosts UFC cage fight on the White House lawn
items.summary: Thousands are expected at the mixed martial arts fight, which coincides with Trump's 80th birthday.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在白宫草坪举办UFC笼斗赛
items.summary_zh: 这场综合格斗比赛预计将有数千人参加，恰逢特朗普的 80 岁生日。

items.title: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
items.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.
items.title_zh: 国际足联将向索马里裁判阿坦支付全额世界杯费用
items.summary_zh: 被拒绝进入美国执法世界杯的索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦仍将从国际足联获得全额比赛费用。

items.title: 'Boyfriend duties call,' Trudeau says after skipping Canada match to watch Perry
items.summary: Cameras caught Perry running off stage to greet the former Canadian leader with a kiss.
items.title_zh: 特鲁多在缺席加拿大比赛去看佩里后说道：“男朋友的职责在召唤”
items.summary_zh: 摄像机拍到佩里跑下舞台，亲吻这位加拿大前领导人。

items.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
items.summary: Nobody was seriously hurt as a result of the accident in the Spanish town, local authorities say.
items.title_zh: 卡尔塔马小吃节期间旅游列车翻车致17人受伤
items.summary_zh: 当地政府称，西班牙小镇发生的这起事故没有造成人员严重受伤。

items.title: Switzerland Rejects Measure to Cap Its Population at 10 Million
items.summary: The referendum was about limiting migration after the number of residents rose by more than a quarter since 2000, but it was framed around affordability and sustainability.
items.title_zh: 瑞士拒绝将人口限制在 1000 万以内的措施
items.summary_zh: 自 2000 年以来，居民人数增加了四分之一以上，这次公投的目的是限制移民，但它是围绕负担能力和可持续性进行的。

items.title: UK Forces Seize Russian Shadow Fleet Oil Tanker
items.summary: Britain’s Defense Ministry said it was the first time that British forces had acted alone to stop a ship in the fleet, a collection of vessels that Russia uses to move fuel and evade sanctions.
items.title_zh: 英国军队扣押俄罗斯影子舰队油轮
items.summary_zh: 英国国防部表示，这是英国军队首次单独采取行动拦截该舰队中的一艘船只，该舰队是俄罗斯用来运输燃料和逃避制裁的船只的集合。

items.title: The G7 Summit Is Dogged by Chaos and Divided by Trump
items.summary: Group of 7 meetings once embodied the effort to sustain the global diplomatic order. This year’s gathering, starting on Monday, symbolizes its fragmentation.
items.title_zh: G7峰会陷入混乱并因特朗普而分裂
items.summary_zh: 七国集团会议曾经是维护全球外交秩序的努力的体现。今年的聚会从周一开始，象征着它的分裂。

items.title: Curaçao Is the Smallest Country Ever to Reach the World Cup
items.summary: Competing for the first time, Curaçao is brimming with joy. Most of the Caribbean nation’s team was born and raised in the Netherlands, but residents say the players represent them.
items.title_zh: 库拉索岛是有史以来参加世界杯的最小国家
items.summary_zh: 第一次参加比赛，库拉索岛充满了喜悦。这个加勒比国家队的大部分球员都在荷兰出生和长大，但当地居民表示，球员代表了他们。

items.title: Japan Is Running Out of Royals. Are More Men the Answer?
items.summary: Japan’s legislature is drafting a plan to allow the imperial family to adopt distant male relatives. But some in Japan would prefer a female emperor.
items.title_zh: 日本皇室成员即将耗尽。更多男人是答案吗？
items.summary_zh: 日本立法机关正在起草一项计划，允许皇室收养远房男性亲属。但日本有些人更喜欢女天皇。

items.title: With a Deal Seemingly Close, the U.S. Faces an Iran More Willing to Withstand Pressure
items.summary: Iran’s new, more militaristic leaders have already survived the worst that America and Israel can deliver, and seem readier to take risks.
items.title_zh: 协议看似接近，美国面临着更愿意承受压力的伊朗
items.summary_zh: 伊朗新的、更加军国主义的领导人已经度过了美国和以色列所能经历的最糟糕的时期，并且似乎更愿意承担风险。

items.title: Russia Is Rich in Ballistic Missiles. Ukraine Is Short of Ways to Stop Them.
items.summary: Ukraine is running out of American-made Patriot air-defense interceptors, and is pleading for more.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯拥有丰富的弹道导弹。乌克兰缺乏阻止他们的方法。
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰的美国制造的爱国者防空拦截器即将耗尽，并恳求提供更多。

items.title: Summer of crypto (regs): State of Crypto
items.summary: Lawmakers are debating taxes, the CFTC put out a prediction market proposal and court cases are heating up.
items.title_zh: 加密之夏（regs）：加密状态
items.summary_zh: 立法者正在就税收进行辩论，美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 提出了预测市场提案，法庭案件正在升温。

items.title: SEC's big swing to clear tokenization path isn't likely to get resilience of full rule
items.summary: Former SEC lawyers say that using its power to grant tokenization "innovation" efforts an exemption from securities law isn't as strong as a full-fledged rule.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会为明确代币化道路而做出的重大转变不太可能获得全面规则的恢复力
items.summary_zh: 前 SEC 律师表示，利用其权力授予代币化“创新”努力豁免证券法的力度，并不像成熟的规则那么有力。

items.title: Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other as tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6 billion
items.summary: Not all crypto exchange executives agree, but the data does not lie: centralized exchange trading volumes dropped more than 11% to $4.61 trillion, their lowest since late 2024.
items.title_zh: 随着代币化国债市场规模达到 146 亿美元，华尔街和加密货币正在相互碰撞
items.summary_zh: 并非所有加密货币交易所高管都同意这一观点，但数据不会说谎：中心化交易所交易量下降超过 11%，至 4.61 万亿美元，为 2024 年底以来的最低水平。

items.title: Stablecoins Were Meant to Disrupt Finance. Instead, They Became Idle Cash.
items.summary: O’Connor argues that crypto’s clearest success story has scaled as money but not as capital.
items.title_zh: 稳定币的目的是颠覆金融。相反，它们变成了闲置现金。
items.summary_zh: 奥康纳认为，加密货币最明显的成功故事是作为货币而不是资本来扩展的。

items.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial to fund UFC fighter bonuses in USD1 stablecoin at White House event
items.summary: The deal puts USD1 branding inside the Octagon at an event held on the White House South Lawn, on President Trump's 80th birthday.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的世界自由金融公司将在白宫活动中以 1 美元稳定币为 UFC 选手奖金提供资金
items.summary_zh: 该协议将在特朗普总统 80 岁生日之际在白宫南草坪举行的活动中将 1 美元品牌印在八角形内。

items.title: CFTC sues New Mexico in latest bid to assert authority over sports betting markets
items.summary: New Mexico is the next state in the CFTC's crosshairs as the fight continues over regulatory jurisdiction over sports betting.
items.title_zh: CFTC 起诉新墨西哥州，以维护对体育博彩市场的权威
items.summary_zh: 随着体育博彩监管管辖权之争仍在继续，新墨西哥州成为商品期货交易委员会关注的下一个州。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Gensler rejects CFTC claim of authority over prediction market sports betting
items.summary: Gary Gensler is calling malarkey the claim that the CFTC has jurisdiction over prediction markets, specifically sports bets.
items.title_zh: SEC 前主席 Gensler 拒绝 CFTC 声称对预测市场体育博彩拥有权威
items.summary_zh: 加里·詹斯勒 (Gary Gensler) 称 CFTC 对预测市场（特别是体育博彩）拥有管辖权的说法是胡言乱语。

items.title: Early Airbnb, DoorDash backer Y Combinator says Clarity Act could bring crypto to ‘every’ portfolio company
items.summary: Also a backer of companies like Coinbase, OpenAI, Stripe, Reddit, OpenAI and Kalshi, Y Combinator wants to see Congress pass the CLARITY Act.
items.title_zh: Airbnb 和 DoorDash 的早期支持者 Y Combinator 表示，Clarity Act 可以为“每家”投资组合公司带来加密货币
items.summary_zh: Y Combinator 也是 Coinbase、OpenAI、Stripe、Reddit、OpenAI 和 Kalshi 等公司的支持者，希望看到国会通过 CLARITY 法案。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
items.title_zh: 面向下一个工作时代的新 OpenAI Academy 课程
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了三门学院课程，帮助人们培养实用的人工智能技能、创建可重复的工作流程以及在日常工作中应用代理。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.title_zh: 天体物理学家如何使用 Codex 帮助模拟黑洞
items.summary_zh: 了解天体物理学家 Chi-kwan Chan 如何使用 Codex 构建黑洞模拟，帮助科学家研究极端物理学并测试爱因斯坦的广义相对论。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Ona
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 计划收购 Ona，以通过安全、持久的云环境扩展 Codex，从而实现跨企业工作流程长期运行的 AI 代理。

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.summary: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 与中国相关的影响力行动瞄准了美国的人工智能辩论

items.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
items.summary: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.
items.title_zh: 从数据到决策：伦敦证券交易所集团如何扩展可信人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解 LSEG 如何使用 OpenAI 在其全球业务中扩展可信 AI，加速洞察、缩短发布周期并为 4,000 名员工提供支持。

items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 2 部分）：从 nn.Linear 到融合 MLP
